name: CNT Ribbed Cotton Vest — 3-Pack White
nameSwahili: Fulana za CNT Nyeupe — Paketi ya 3
description: CNT-brand ribbed cotton vests in classic white — sold as a 3-pack. Soft, breathable cotton rib with clean shoulder straps and scoop neck. The reliable under-shirt for every man's drawer.

name: Bersel Boxer Brief Variety Pack — 8 Pieces
description: Bersel cotton-stretch boxer brief variety pack — 8 pieces in mixed colours including black, grey, navy and prints. Soft elastic waistband with brand-printed band and contoured fit. Everyday comfort in one bundle.
